name: OpenIPAHound 13 Support - Node Kind Inventory
description: Shows OpenIPAHound custom nodes so users can quickly inspect imported FreeIPA object kinds and their UI icons.
query:
MATCH (n)
WHERE n:IPA_Environment
   OR n:IPA_User
   OR n:IPA_Group
   OR n:IPA_Role
   OR n:IPA_Privilege
   OR n:IPA_Permission
   OR n:IPA_CA
   OR n:IPA_CertificateTemplate
   OR n:IPA_SELinux
   OR n:IPA_TrustedDomain
   OR n:IPA_Computer
   OR n:IPA_Service
   OR n:IPA_HostGroup
RETURN n
LIMIT 1000
